response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering experience across multiple languages and domains, including geospatial/GIS projects, but his expertise is heavily skewed toward JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang rather than the required C++/Rust focus. While he demonstrates problem-solving and system design skills, there is limited evidence of deep systems programming experience with the specific technologies (C++, Linux server apps, distributed systems) and geospatial/navigation pipelines required for this role. His recent roles at Stripe and Shopify lack relevance to routing/tiling pipelines.
strengths: Proven track record in building scalable, distributed systems with low-latency requirements (e.g., Dunnhumby, Shopify)
Experience with geospatial/GIS development through open-source GISCollective and Green Map projects
Strong engineering fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, system design) and cross-language adaptability
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ or Rust, which are primary requirements for this role
Limited exposure to navigation/routing systems or tile-based data processing pipelines
Recent work (Stripe, Shopify) is entirely unrelated to geospatial navigation, raising questions about domain-specific expertise
